name: homepage-seed-fallback-hero-scale
title: Fix homepage seed fallback and hero scale
description: 修复首页公益 seed 因损坏 taverns.json 被隐藏导致数据为 0，并收小首页 hero 左侧字号。
creator: lijin
notes: Root cause: runtime taverns.json is invalid JSON; read paths need public-welfare seed fallback while preserving damaged file. Also shrink homepage hero title. Verification passed: backend full pytest, frontend typecheck/build/test, API count=9, Playwright desktop/mobile screenshots. Trellis context validation passed. Follow-up: discover list was empty because /api/v1/taverns returned 500 when a valid JSON store contained a partial public-welfare seed record missing Tavern fields. Follow-up fixed Discover: partial seed record now overlays canonical public-welfare read fallback; API/Vite return count=10; Playwright discover desktop/mobile passed. Runtime taverns.json thoroughly repaired after backup: partial pw_third_shelf_observatory restored canonically, _memory_atoms preserved, API/proxy count=10, homepage/discover browser checks passed. Follow-up hero typography polish: two-line compact title, smaller type scale, build/test/browser check passed. Follow-up rules-chat fix: root cause was the native v1 rules fallback echoing message + scene_prompt (`这里的气味和灯光...氛围是...`), while core rules fallback used a generic helper tone for unmatched messages; both now reuse public-welfare tavern-specific fallback copy and avoid prompt/scene leakage. Focused pytest, compileall, backend runtime suite, and live API weather-chat check passed. Follow-up artifact cleanup: repaired prior bad rules-chat artifacts in runtime data with backups; removed old auto memory/state cards containing prompt leakage, rewrote affected visitor-demo assistant messages to current rules responses, removed codex verification chat files, and reset public-welfare rules token_used to 0.
